evidence: The paper uses node impurity exclusively for feature selection, stating: "We also averaged variable importance measures from these 10 random forest models based on node impurity... The 10% least contributing variables were excluded." For biological interpretation, they pivot to correlation-based functional enrichment analysis: "FEA uses associations of all measured CSF proteins with MS severity outcomes (MS-DSS at baseline, MS-DSS at follow-up, and BVD severity): either captured by correlation coefficients (for STRING ordered analysis)." Conclusions rest on independent cohort validation (17-26% variance explained) and functional pathway enrichment, not on importance magnitude or ranking.
